_comment: Ground decal scatter (the Loom): projects the drop's paintings/decals/ onto the terrain per cell, biome-keyed, so ground reads lived-in — moss in the wet, scorch on the volcano, cracks in the dry, lichen on rock, tide stains on the strand. Deterministic per cell, presentation only (never saved/fingerprinted). `slot` is a Cards billboard slot; `attempts` = candidate points per 128m cell (accepted by biome weight × cell density), `size` = decal projection box [x,y,z] before per-instance scale. path_wear is intentionally absent — it belongs to the InteractionField desire-path layer, not biome scatter. Tune attempts to taste; decals aren't free, so keep them sparse-ish (distance-faded past ~70m).
